subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: After these occurrences, it will be better.... Tolstoy is a deeply learned man. I wanted him to embrace the blessed Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از اینها خوب میشود من از یک چیز متاثر شدم که یکوقت نوشته بودند
subcodes.subjects: @criticism and its limits, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
